title: Xtra Crispy Kenyan Challots Skewers
description: A crispy and energizing Kenyan dish featuring challots, with an earthy flavor and a mother-sauce base, suitable for an ayurvedic rajasic diet
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the flour, cornstarch, and spices.
Add the chopped challots to the bowl and toss to coat with the flour mixture.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the mother sauce, olive oil, salt, black pepper, and lemon juice.
Add the sauce mixture to the bowl with the challots and toss to coat.
Thread the coated challots onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 20 minutes.
Increase the oven temperature to 425 degrees Fahrenheit and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until crispy.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
